name: Hyaluronic Acid
description: A naturally occurring molecule that can hold up to 1000x its weight in water. It draws moisture from the environment into the skin, providing intense hydration at multiple layers.

name: Niacinamide
description: Also known as Vitamin B3, this multitasking ingredient regulates sebum production, minimizes pores, and strengthens the skin barrier. Effective at concentrations of 2-10%.

name: Salicylic Acid
description: A beta-hydroxy acid that is oil-soluble, allowing it to penetrate deep into pores. It dissolves the bonds between dead skin cells, effectively treating and preventing acne.

name: Retinol
description: A derivative of Vitamin A and the gold standard for anti-aging. It accelerates cell turnover, stimulates collagen production, and improves skin texture and tone over time.

name: Vitamin C (L-Ascorbic Acid)
description: A potent antioxidant that neutralizes free radicals, brightens the complexion, and stimulates collagen synthesis. Most effective at 10-20% concentration with a pH below 3.5.

name: Ceramides
description: Naturally occurring lipids that make up over 50% of the skin's barrier. Topical ceramides repair and strengthen a compromised barrier, locking in moisture and keeping irritants out.

name: Glycolic Acid
description: The smallest alpha-hydroxy acid with excellent skin penetration. It dissolves dead skin cells on the surface, revealing brighter, smoother skin underneath.

name: Squalane
description: A lightweight, plant-derived oil that mimics the skin's natural sebum. It provides non-greasy hydration and helps other ingredients penetrate more effectively.
